process.commandLine: B=/mnt/symmask; if cat "$B/control.txt" 2>/dev/null | grep -q CONTROL_SECRET; then echo CONTROL_OK; else echo CONTROL_MISSING; fi; if cat "$B/real_file.txt" 2>/dev/null | grep -q FILE_TARGET_SECRET; then echo SYMFILE_LEAK; else echo SYMFILE_MASKED_OK; fi; if [ -d "$B/real_file.txt" ]; then echo SYMFILE_IS_DIR_BUG; else echo SYMFILE_NOT_DIR_OK; fi
